suggestions.title: Add test coverage for missing required storage account env var
suggestions.recommendation: Add a unit test asserting BlobWriter() raises ValueError when ROSTER_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME is missing or blank.

suggestions.title: Clarify intended overwrite behavior for failed payload blobs
suggestions.recommendation: Decide whether failed/{run_date_utc}.json should overwrite. Implement deterministic behavior and test it.

suggestions.title: Add explicit test for custom container in write_failed()
suggestions.recommendation: Add a test that sets ROSTER_CONTAINER_NAME and validates write_failed() targets that container.
